ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_type" INTEGER /* ID of the issue type */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level */,
  "status" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the issue */,
  "estimated_hours" TEXT /* Estimated hours to resolve the issue */,
  "actual_hours" TEXT /* Actual hours spent on the issue */,
  "parent_issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent issue (for sub-issues) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the issue */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_issue_type FOREIGN KEY ("issue_type") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type (e.g., bug, feature, task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignees" (
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignee */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the assignee is assigned to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the assignee was assigned to the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the assignee completed the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignees_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, team lead, project manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the history entry belongs to */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status the issue was updated to */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status update */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment for the status update */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the issue history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
